summary: Completed testing of fiscal printer integration. All 45 backend tests passed. Frontend POS page and Cash Operations page verified working correctly. Bridge status indicator shows 'Casa deconectata' (expected - bridge runs locally). No-bridge confirmation dialog appears when paying, allowing user to continue without fiscal receipt. Bridge ZIP download contains all 3 required files.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended (low priority)

passed_tests: Backend: Login with admin/admin123 - SUCCESS (200, token returned)
Backend: Login with casier/casier123 - SUCCESS (200, token returned)
Backend: POST /api/sales with fiscal_number='12345' and fiscal_status='printed' - SUCCESS
Backend: POST /api/sales with fiscal_status='none' (no fiscal receipt) - SUCCESS
Backend: POST /api/cash-operations creates CASH_IN operation - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/cash-operations/daily-stats returns correct structure (totalCash, totalCard, totalVoucher, cashIn, cashOut, receiptsCount)
Backend: GET /api/cash-operations/history returns operations list
Backend: GET /api/bridge/download returns ZIP file (application/zip)
Backend: Bridge ZIP contains 3 files: fiscal_bridge.py (42786 bytes), install_bridge.bat (735 bytes), start_bridge.bat (523 bytes)
Backend: GET /api/bridge/download requires authentication (returns 403 without token)
Backend: GET /api/settings/fiscal returns default settings
Frontend: POS page loads with products grid (100+ products)
Frontend: POS page shows bridge status indicator 'Casa deconectata' (expected - bridge runs locally)
Frontend: POS payment flow - No-bridge confirmation dialog appears with 'Casa de Marcat Deconectata' title
Frontend: No-bridge dialog shows 'Continua fara bon fiscal' button
Frontend: Sale completes successfully after clicking continue without fiscal
Frontend: Receipt modal (BON FISCAL) appears with sale details
Frontend: Cash Operations page loads with bridge disconnected alert
Frontend: Cash Operations page shows 'Bridge Service nu este pornit!' message with installation instructions
Frontend: 'Descarca Bridge Service (ZIP)' button visible and working
Frontend: Daily stats cards visible (Sold Casa, Incasari Cash, Incasari Card, Bonuri Azi)
Frontend: Operation buttons visible (Raport X, Raport Z, Intrare Bani, Extragere Bani, Istoric, Deschide Sertar)
Frontend: History dialog opens and shows operations list
seed_data_creation: Created test sales with fiscal fields (fiscal_number, fiscal_status) and cash operations (CASH_IN) with TEST_ prefix during API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fiscal printer integration fully tested. Key points: (1) Bridge service (fiscal_bridge.py) runs LOCALLY on user's PC at localhost:5555 - bridge health checks will timeout in cloud environment, which is expected. (2) POS page shows 'Casa deconectata' status and prompts user with confirmation dialog when trying to pay. (3) User can choose to continue without fiscal receipt (fiscal_status='none'). (4) Cash Operations page shows bridge disconnect alert with download button. (5) Bridge ZIP download works and contains 3 files. (6) Sales API accepts fiscal_number and fiscal_status fields. All Romanian UI labels verified.

components: Operation buttons (Report X/Z, Cash In/Out, History, Drawer)

bridge_download_api.details: GET /api/bridge/download returns valid ZIP with fiscal_bridge.py, install_bridge.bat, start_bridge.bat

sales_api_with_fiscal_fields.details: POST /api/sales accepts fiscal_number and fiscal_status fields
